phase: X2 Family C DONE + X3 (Family B+E) IN PROGRESS - B2 + E3 at floor, locked
what: Deep-link capability map + A1 (generic-landing hand-off) LOCK. An entity-specific alert / tile / row / hero that NAMES a record (asset / part / job / PM / machine) must deep-link to THAT record + action - the way utils.js renderRiskStrip already emits asset-hub.html?tag=<asset>. X1 drove every such site to a deep-link AND gave the two reader-less destinations (pm-scheduler, alert-hub) a reader that pre-focuses the named record. This baseline is now a PRESENCE GUARD: each site's deep-link form and each destination's reader must stay present (regression -> gate FAIL). a1_scope_less is 0.

c2_seed_labels.note: Family C / C2 (placeholder-as-label) SEED: the index.html front-door auth + join inputs relied on placeholder text only (no <label>/aria-label) - the most-trafficked form. Fixed with aria-label on each (a11y + recognition: the label survives once the user types). Gate locks each so it cannot regress to placeholder-only. C2 backlog (measured, driven next): marketplace-seller messenger/cert inputs, marketplace-admin search, + dynamic-template fields (resume/analytics/project-manager).

a2_action_focus.note: A2: a deep-linked PM detail lands with the task action focused (not just shown)
A2: the 'schedule the technician' hero carries &action=schedule (carry intent)

a3_state_persistence.note: A3: live search mirrored to URL ?q= (replaceState) so the filter survives reload + leave-and-back-nav; the existing ?q= reader restores it
A3: dashboard filter-chip + category mirrored to URL ?filter=/?cat= + restored before first render
A3: mine-view search/category/status mirrored to URL ?q=/?cat=/?status= + restored on load (team view = server-side, excluded by design)
A3: buyer search + price range mirrored to URL ?q=/?min=/?max= + restored before first load
A3: feed category + search mirrored to URL ?cat=/?q= + restored; thread open/close now PRESERVE q/cat (previously wiped the whole query string = filter amnesia on every thread view)
A3: journal language filter + search mirrored to URL ?filter=/?q= + restored before first render
A3: actor/action/target/search filters mirrored to URL ?actor=/?action=/?target=/?q= + restored before first load
A3: active admin queue tab mirrored to URL ?tab= + restored (per-tab search resets on tab change by design)
A3: active dashboard tab + listing status filter mirrored to URL ?tab=/?status= + restored

a3_coverage.note: A3 list-state persistence COMPLETE for all genuine filtered browse lists. DONE (9): inventory, pm-scheduler, logbook, marketplace, community, voice-journal, audit-log, marketplace-admin, marketplace-seller. EXEMPT: marketplace-seller-profile (a public seller's listings keyed by ?worker=, no user-facing list filter to persist); analytics (filters drive charts, not a detail-drill-back browse list); feedback/index + logbook.backup (not live pages). The live continuity sweep (X0 remainder) will probe back-nav state across all DONE to confirm at runtime.

intentionally_bare_exempt.why: headline is a COUNT ('N PM tasks are due'), names no single entity -> a bare list is correct (A1 governs NAMED entities only).
headline is a COUNT ('N parts at zero'), names no single entity -> bare list is correct.
section 'see all' footers ('All assets ->', 'Inventory ->', 'PM Scheduler ->') are summary nav, not per-entity hand-offs - correctly bare.

denominator_note: 10 entity-emit sites across the home dashboard (strips + hero) + alert-hub + hive card, all deep-linked; 4 destination readers (inventory, logbook, pm-scheduler [NEW], alert-hub [NEW]) pre-focus the named record. 3 count/footer surfaces are documented exempt (generic by nature). This is the A-family (Continuity) A1 lock; A2/A3/A4 + the live continuity sweep follow.

c2_family.note: C2 (placeholder-as-label) driven to 0 across all 41 feature pages. SEED (index auth/join) locked separately in c2_seed_labels. The 3 remaining dynamic/utility inputs now carry a persistent aria-label so the field name survives typing.

c1_recall.note: C1 (recall-dependent entity input). 16 raw candidates surfaced by the scanner; adversarial classification (per-site Explore agent + skeptic verify, workflow wf_1a227e20) confirmed 1 REAL violation (inventory part-number entry) - fixed with a datalist of existing part numbers (recognition + early duplicate-catch) - and 15 verified EXEMPT (definition-of-own-identity fields or free-form NL notes; you cannot pick from a list an entity you are authoring). Measured REAL C1 violations = 0.

c1_exempt.reason: free-form NL question to the asset-brain AI, not an entity identifier
handover signature line (document), composed not selected
authors the part's own canonical name
edits the asset's own canonical id
edits the asset's own canonical name
edits the asset's own type attribute (free-form, no controlled vocab)
edits the asset's own location attribute (no canonical location master)
seller authors their own certification claims
names the user's own resume document

Free-form manufacturer part number (e.g. BRG-6313 / SKF-6205-2RS) the seller reads off their OWN part when posting a listing - there is no enumerable picker for arbitrary manufacturer part numbers, and the field carries a PERSISTENT visible <label> "Part number" (recognition intact); the placeholder is a format example, not the label. Optional field. Triaged 2026-07-18.

c3_status_on_record.note: C3 (external memory for status) PRESENCE proxy [HARD]. Every canonical operational record-card surface must render at least one status / last-action / timestamp element on each card so the user never has to recall where a job/asset/part stands. Confirmed present across all 9 surfaces; each is a presence-guard (regression -> gate FAIL). SALIENCE (is it the RIGHT state, prominent enough) is SOFT -> Ian's eye (e.g. asset-hub card shows criticality; live-health/last-PM is a SOFT enhancement candidate).

b2_fixed.note: B2 (low information scent). 4 contentless link/button labels (View/Open) now carry an aria-label naming the object so screen-reader button-navigation + the label predicts the target (NN/g info-scent). The icon-only half of B2 is covered separately by validate_icon_button_label.py (reused).

e3_fixed.note: E3 (destructive action without recovery). Scanner found 10 candidates; an adversarial trace workflow (wf_49f96d23, follows inline AND delegated handlers) found 4 REAL: marketplace-admin Remove-ID + Remove-Cert (both via handleSellerAction unverify - the badge-revoke path now confirms via whConfirm) and report-sender deleteContact (now confirms). The 4th REAL (marketplace watchlist Remove) is a REVERSIBLE toggle -> a confirm would be confirm-fatigue -> exempt. The other 6 were SAFE (already whConfirm) or NOT_DESTRUCTIVE (form-state only / modal close).

e3_triage.note: Full disposition of the 10 E3 candidates (wf_49f96d23, Explore agent + skeptic).
real_exempt_reversible: marketplace#watchlist-Remove (toggleWatchlist - re-add is 1 click; confirm = confirm-fatigue)

b3_fixed.note: B3 (dead-end / no next step). 24 empty-state candidates triaged (wf_e158e439, one Explore agent each) -> 6 REAL dead-ends (copy named an action/page with NO clickable path) each given a CTA inside the empty state; 18 EXEMPT (10 dashboard-maturity / 7 on-page-control / 1 filter-empty - recovery is on-page or the state is an intentional honest-empty).

e2_fixed.note: E2 (unactionable error). 15 inline validation-error regions were silent to assistive tech (no aria-describedby tie, no role=alert; aria-describedby is 0 platform-wide). Each now carries role=alert + aria-live=assertive so a screen reader ANNOUNCES the error text when it appears (WCAG 4.1.3; form-level errors). Field-level aria-describedby ties are a SOFT enhancement. Measured E2 (silent errors) = 0.
